positive: A stylized, maximalist geometric pattern featuring abstract cosmic elements: interlocking planets, nebula swirls, and crystalline constellations. The pattern should be rendered with a clean, bold silhouette suitable for repeat apparel printing. Use a limited palette of deep midnight blues, electric cyan, vibrant violet, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, creating a mesmerizing, non-repeating yet seamless arrangement of forms. Style: Art Deco meets Celestial Surrealism. Lighting: Flat, high-contrast, graphic, and uniform. Composition details: Ensure the pattern works well as a single, repeating tile for print fabric.
